title: 薯片手 ChipHand 首个开源候选版
changes: Rename the product to 薯片手 / ChipHand and adopt the stable com.huyee.chiphand bundle identifier.
Add a complete Klein-blue and potato-yellow visual system with a generated full-size app icon.
Add an offline responsive user guide with four generated gesture illustrations and troubleshooting.
Bundle all runtime assets, documentation, MIT license, and Apache-2.0 third-party notices.
Build a universal arm64 and x86_64 app and package local DMG and ZIP artifacts with SHA-256 checksums.
verification: Web regression suite passed 32 tests and TypeScript typecheck passed
Universal warnings-as-errors Release build passed for arm64 and x86_64
Strict ad-hoc codesign and designated requirement checks passed
DMG mounted successfully with app, model, offline guide, licenses, and Applications shortcut
Desktop and 390px mobile guide layouts passed real-browser visual inspection
Installed app window, full icon, and bundled help button passed local UI inspection
